title: Automated Timeline from Duration
excerpt:
I want to make the scheduled timeline be automatically calculated. I want it to subtract Est. (hrs) from the Due date. How can I do this? 
  
I see the timeline type column can be driven by a number column in the setting…

posts.author: joe.morgans (Joseph Morgans)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to make the scheduled timeline be automatically calculated. I want it to subtract Est. (hrs) from the Due date. How can I do this?

image1857×770 122 KB

I see the timeline type column can be driven by a number column in the settings, but unfortunately my Est. (hrs) column is a formula, so I cannot do that.
